fields.summary: Retrieves the design coordinates for the named instance at the specified index.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: An array of design coordinate values for the named instance.

fields.summary: Retrieves the design coordinates for the named instance at the specified index into a provided span.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.
params.coords: When this method returns, contains the design coordinate values written to the span. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: The number of design coordinates written to <paramref name="coords" />.

entries.signature: public int GetNamedInstanceDesignCoords (int instanceIndex, Span<float> coords);

fields.summary: Gets the number of design coordinates for the named instance at the specified index.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The number of design coordinates for the named instance.

fields.summary: Gets the PostScript name identifier for the named instance at the specified index.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the PostScript name of the named instance.

fields.summary: Gets the subfamily name identifier for the named instance at the specified index.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the subfamily name of the named instance.

fields.summary: Gets the name identifier for the color entry at the specified index in the font's color palette.

params.colorIndex: The zero-based index of the color entry.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the color entry name.

fields.summary: Retrieves all color values in the specified palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: An array of RGBA color values (as <see langword="uint" />) in the palette.

fields.summary: Retrieves color values from the specified palette into a provided span.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.
params.colors: When this method returns, contains the RGBA color values written to the span. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: The number of color values written to <paramref name="colors" />.

entries.signature: public int GetPaletteColors (int paletteIndex, Span<uint> colors);

fields.summary: Gets the flags for the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: A bitwise combination of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeColorPaletteFlags" /> values describing the palette.

fields.summary: Gets the name identifier for the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the palette name.

fields.summary: Retrieves information about font variation axes into a provided span.

params.axes: When this method returns, contains the axis information written to the span. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: The number of variation axes written to <paramref name="axes" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color layer (COLR) data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains COLR color layer data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains embedded color PNG glyphs.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains color PNG data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains embedded color SVG glyphs.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains color SVG data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color palette (CPAL) data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains CPAL palette data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains variable font (OpenType Variations) data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font supports OpenType Variations; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in the font.
fields.value: The number of named instances in the font.

fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes defined in the font.
fields.value: The number of color palettes in the font.

fields.summary: Attempts to find information about the variation axis identified by the specified tag.

params.tag: The four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.
params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains the axis information if found. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the axis was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in the font.
Gets an array of information about all variation axes defined in the font.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo" /> values describing each variation axis.
